feedback.title: Feedback
today.empty.activity: No activity yet — staff actions, deliverables, and handoffs will appear here as they happen.
today.empty.jobs: Ready to start. Ask your Desk AI to delegate work — jobs will appear here as they run.
inbound.empty.list: No missions inbound yet. When peers send you work, it'll land here.
deliverables.empty.all: No deliverables yet. Ask the Desk AI for a write-up and it'll land here.
members.hire_tooltip: Hire a new virtual staff (AI fills in the persona)
skills.explainer.lead: Skills are the things your AI staff can do
skills.explainer.lead_tail: — like reading email, drafting PPT decks, or summarizing meetings.
skills.yours_empty.lead: You haven't enabled any skills yet.
skills.triage.section_subtitle: Inbound routing rules evaluated in priority order. Higher priority = runs first.
references.explainer.lead: References are the source material your AI staff can quote
references.explainer.lead_tail: — style guides, brand docs, FAQs, contract templates, anything you want the AI to ground its answers in instead of making it up.
references.explainer.info_tooltip: Enable a reference below to make it available to your staff. Each staff member can be allowed or denied specific references from their card on /members.
references.yours_empty.lead: You haven't enabled any references yet.
references.direct.name_folder_placeholde: Each reference defaults to its file name
references.direct.pin_whole_file_help: The whole content is always available and exact, suitable for standards such as ISO26262 that must be precise.
references.direct.required_single: Name, authority, and version are required
references.direct.local_path_required: Choose or enter a local file path
references.direct.folder_files_required: Select at least one file from the folder
references.file_picker.title: Choose a local file
templates.explainer.lead: Templates are the shapes for deliverables
templates.explainer.lead_tail: — like "weekly status update" or "meeting brief" or "invoice".
templates.yours_empty.lead: You haven't enabled any templates yet.
me.section.tools: Tools the desk AI can use
language_switcher.load_failed: Could not load your language setting — reload the page
me.connections.empty: You have not configured any connections yet.
chat.composer_placeholder: Message your desk AI… (hold Space to talk)
chat.tts_error_rate_limited: Too many read-aloud requests. Try again shortly.
chat.tts_error_generic: Could not read this message aloud.
chat.tts_error_play_blocked: Browser blocked audio playback. Click again to retry.
members.empty.title: You haven't hired any staff yet — but your Desk AI is here.
members.empty.body_mid: (already wired into the chat above) and lets you hire additional
members.empty.body_tail: — like an Email Triage Assistant, a Slide Deck Maker, a Research Aide. Each staff member specializes in one job, inherits your Gmail/Office connections from
members.empty.body_tail2: , and chats with you in their own thread.
members.empty.starter_chat: Try a quick task in chat (your Desk AI can do it)
members.empty.why_label: Why is the Desk AI separate?
members.empty.why_link: ADR-015 — the Desk AI is a singleton anchored to your desk, not a roster entry.
members.card.configure_title: Configure this staff (persona, skills, budget, proxy)
members.card.dismiss_title: Dismiss {name} — hide from roster (restore via Reset on /me page)
members.card.dismiss_confirm: Dismiss {name}? They'll be hidden from the roster. To bring them back, use "Reset + reload page" on the /me page.
members.detail.private_chat_title: Private chat lives entirely outside the main desk-AI thread — context here never leaks back.
members.detail.authorizations_title: Inherited from the owner (CEO). To grant or revoke, edit on /me.
members.detail.authorizations_empty: No external integrations set on the owner yet. Add them on /me to share with all staff.
members.detail.cli_binary: CLI binary (hint — session is a bash shell)
staff.hire.title: + Hire a virtual staff
staff.hire.sketch_lead: Tell me one sentence about the role you need. AI fills in the name, title, and full work style — you review before hiring.
staff.hire.sketch_suggested: Based on your owner intro, I've pre-filled a suggestion below. Edit or replace as needed.
staff.hire.quick_pick.email_blurb: Drafts replies, sorts inbox, summarizes long threads
staff.hire.quick_pick.email_sketch: email triage assistant — sort the inbox, draft polite replies to client questions, summarize long threads, flag anything that needs my eyes
staff.hire.quick_pick.slides_blurb: Outlines and builds .pptx files from your bullet points
staff.hire.quick_pick.slides_sketch: slide deck maker — turn my bullet points into a clean .pptx outline, pick visuals, keep the tone consistent across the deck
staff.hire.quick_pick.research_sketch: research aide — cross-reference documents I drop in, summarize web pages, surface inconsistencies, cite sources
staff.hire.sketch_placeholder: e.g. email triage assistant — sort inbox, draft polite replies, summarize long threads
staff.hire.sketch_footer: Plain English (or 中文) is fine — "邮件助理，帮我整理客户来信" works. After hiring, you can fine-tune the skill access (default: inherits ALL your skills) from the staff's gear icon.
staff.hire.review_lead: Review the draft below — edit anything before you hire. All three fields are required.
staff.hire.name_hint: — short handle you @-mention in chat (e.g. "Mira", "小李")
staff.hire.role_hint: — what this staff does, shown on their card
staff.hire.role_placeholder: e.g. Email Triage Assistant / 邮件助理
staff.hire.system_prompt_hint: — how they work: responsibilities, tone, focus (you can edit anytime)
staff.hire.review_footer: By default this staff inherits ALL your skills + integrations. To BLOCK a specific skill for this staff (e.g. don't let an email assistant run code), open their gear icon → "Skills allowed" after hiring.
staff.config.identity.name: Name
staff.config.persona.placeholder: Click to add a persona / work style…
staff.config.persona.polish_done: ✓ Polished. Click Save or edit further.
staff.config.skills.desc: By default this staff inherits ALL your skills. Uncheck a skill to BLOCK it for this staff specifically (e.g. don't give an Email Triage assistant access to your code-execution skill). Skills you haven't enabled yet are managed on the {link} page.
staff.config.skills.none_enabled_lead: You haven't enabled any skills yet — visit
staff.config.skills.none_enabled_tail: to set up what your staff can do.
staff.config.budget.no_cap_desc: Set a cap below to enable budget tracking and pre-dispatch refusal.
staff.config.budget.est_title: Some ledger rows used estimated token counts (LLM didn't report usage).
staff.config.budget.no_cap_inherits: No cap — inherits the desk-level budget if any.
staff.config.budget.invalid: Enter a non-negative number or leave blank for no cap.
staff.config.proxy.desc: If this staff stalls 30+ minutes, the proxy picks up its queue. Only local-AI staff (not CLI / peer) can act as a proxy.
staff.config.danger.desc: Dismiss this staff. They'll be hidden from the roster until reset.
staff.config.danger.confirm: Dismiss {name}? They'll be hidden from the roster until reset.
staff.private_chat.empty: Private 1:1 with {name}. Messages here stay out of the main desk-AI thread.
staff.private_chat.placeholder: Message {name} privately… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for newline)
staff.cli.tmux_attach_title: Copy the command to attach this session from a local terminal
staff.cli.kill_confirm: Kill the tmux session for this CLI? Output history is lost.
me.replay_onboarding_desc: Walk through the welcome wizard again. Your current settings pre-fill so you can review or update.
me.llm_mode.debug_explainer: All staff chat currently uses one global DeepSeek key from the dev .env. No quota tracking, no BYOK.
me.llm_mode.iter018_pending: Full BYOK + per-staff routing arrives in iter-018 (accepted 2026-05-19, in build).
onboarding.step1.title: Welcome to Holon
onboarding.step1.body: Holon gives you a small team of AI staff who work at your desk — drafting emails, summarizing inboxes, putting decks together. Pick the role that fits you best and we'll set up sensible defaults. You can change anything later in Settings.
onboarding.step1.custom_card_label: None of these fit — I'll customize
onboarding.step1.custom_card_tag: Skip the preset and describe your role yourself in the next step.
onboarding.step4.no_llm_message: AI not configured yet — head to Step 6 to pick an LLM provider, then come back to try this.
onboarding.step6.title: Choose your LLM
onboarding.step6.subtitle: Holon's free trial gets you started fast, or bring your own API key for full control.
onboarding.step6.trial_hint: Free for your first few thousand messages. Switch later anytime.
onboarding.step6.byok_hint: Configure here directly. You can change provider any time in /me.
onboarding.step6.byok_sub: Choose a provider, paste your key, test it, and continue.
me.llm_settings.intro: Choose which provider powers your chats. Add API keys for full control, or use Holon's free DeepSeek trial.
me.llm_settings.confirm_remove: Remove this API key? You can re-add it any time.
me.llm_modal.title: {provider} API key
onboarding.step2.language_caveat_partial: Most of the UI already speaks your language. A few advanced screens will follow.
chat.empty.chip_chat_pain_retry: Still want to chat about that pain point?
chat.onboarding_done_banner: You're all set! Your desk is ready — ask anything or assign a task below.
meeting.done_body: Your responses are saved locally. We will follow up only if you opted in.
me.redo_interview_desc: Already shared your pain points but want to refresh? Re-run the interview.
meeting.chat.no_llm_body: Head to /me LLM Settings to add an API key, then come back for the interview.
wechat.connector_desc: Paste WeChat messages directly into your inbox. Missions appear immediately and are ready to accept or reject.
wechat.ai.no_llm: Configure an LLM provider in /me Settings to enable AI analysis.
wechat.ai.failed: AI analysis failed — retry by reopening this mission.
me.channels.toast.connecting: Connecting — status will update in a moment.
me.channels.toast.connect_failed: Couldn't connect — check the value and retry.
me.channels.wechat.live_desc: Already running an OpenClaw-compatible WeChat gateway on an always-on host? Paste its base URL to sync messages into your inbox. Any connection error appears here.
me.channels.wechat.sim_desc: Try the full WeChat ingress chain right now with no setup and no network — a simulated OpenClaw gateway injects a fake message that flows through triage and lands in your inbox as a real mission.
me.channels.wechat.sim_placeholder: Type a fake WeChat message to inject…
me.channels.telegram.desc: Connect a Telegram bot so messages sent to it land in your inbox as missions. Goes live immediately once you paste a bot token from @BotFather.
me.channels.telegram.step1: Open @BotFather in Telegram and send /newbot (or reuse an existing bot).
me.channels.telegram.step2: Copy the bot token it gives you (looks like 123456789:AA…).
me.channels.telegram.step3: Paste the token below and connect.
me.working_style.picker_hint: Load from Store templates, then customize freely.
me.working_style.overwrite_confirm: AI Secretary Instructions already has content. Overwrite it with “{name}”?
voice.local_fallback_hint: Configure a local voice engine to use local transcription → /connectors
voice.err_not_allowed: Microphone blocked — allow mic permission in the browser
voice_mode.tap_stop_hint: Tap stop if the room is noisy
voice_mode.err_transcribe: Could not transcribe that. Listening again.
voice_mode.err_send: Could not send that. Listening again.
voice_mode.err_tts: Could not read the reply aloud. Listening again.
